name: Metal Hurlant Chronicles
overview: Metal Hurlant Chronicles is inspired by the popular comics anthology Métal Hurlant, which in turn inspired the well known fantasy magazine Heavy Metal. Each episode takes place on a different planet - fantastical in its own way - with the common thread between stories being a traveling asteroid that impacts the lives of all it encounters.

trailers.title: METAL HURLANT CHRONICLES - Season 1 | New TRAILER | english Full HD
